user.title: Connect to Notion
user.description: Create an internal integration at notion.so/my-integrations and paste the API key below.

database.title: Select Database
database.description: Paste the URL or ID of the Notion database. Make sure the integration has been added to the database in Notion.

status.title: Configure Status Columns
status.description: Choose the property that represents task status and which values map to active vs completed.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Notion API. Check your network.
error.database_not_found: Database not found. Check the URL/ID.
error.database_not_shared: Database not shared with integration. Open the database in Notion and add your integration via the '...' menu.

abort.no_status_property: No select or status property found in this database.
